rationale: Evidence tab lists bundle files with metadata, integrates whitelisted ≤64KB inline view via existing runBundleFile GraphQL (which enforces extension+size), download endpoint added with path-traversal-safe canonicalisation, and e2e covers list/view/truncated/download.

findings.summary: Inline view size/whitelist enforcement is delegated to the backend runBundleFile resolver (returns truncated/null content); UI correctly surfaces the truncated state.
Download handler enforces path confinement under the bundle root and forces attachment disposition.
